user.title: Meteotemplate Weather Station
user.description: Enter the URL of the Station Feed JSON output of a Meteotemplate site, e.g. https://example.nl/meteotemplate/plugins/stationFeed/index.php?format=json

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to that URL.
error.invalid_data: The URL responded, but it is not a valid Meteotemplate feed (no 'current_conditions').
